name: C00lkidd ● Pr3ttyPrincess ● Bluudud
description:
You are babysitting the hackers trio ? Naaahhhh

You was just a random survivor/killer doing his job (surviving/killing) and suddenly, The Spectre told you to babysitting the hacker trio : Bluudud, Pr3ttyPrincess, C00lkidd. And serioulsy, they are something very silly and annoying but whataver, if you don’t you gonna die.


Btw if there is some mistakes don’t forget to tell me 


It took me 1 hour to make this 🥹 (Second message for killer POV) 


(Btw I recreated it because idk what’s happen the real one got banned)
